BEST CLIMATE FOR PEOPLE,
MATERIALS & THE ENVIRONMENT
Air Humidification
Cooling
DUST & ODOUR REDUCTION
MOISTURE MEASUREMENT
Air humidification, cooling, dust binding & moisture measurement
Air humidification
guarantees constant and optimal air humidity – essential parameters for process quality in a wide range of industries.
Merlin Technology GmbH develops solutions
with efficient air humidification systems
for an optimal indoor climate in production halls, workshops and offices. Optimal humidity allows:
Scrap reduction
Rework reduction
Improved product quality
Increased well-being of employees
merlin
also has
many years of expertise in the field of
moisture measurement technology
for various applications. Equipment at the highest level is exported to over 80 countries.

Countries

HIGH-PRESSURE ATOMIZATION
IN ROOMS
With merlin
, you get the ideal system for your needs. We analyse your requirements and wishes and implement them in a successful project – with expertise and experience since 1995.
GET IN TOUCH
INQUIRY
CALL US
EMAIL
HIGH-PRESSURE ATOMIZATION
IN AHU SYSTEMS
Humidification in AHU systems is a key component in creating a balanced indoor climate and helps to improve air quality. By controlling the humidity level, not only is the well-being of the users improved, but the risk of health problems caused by dry air is also minimized.
Solid industry
know-how
has a name: merlin

MAKE YOUR BUSINESS SMILE
PERFECT INDOOR CLIMATE
HAS A NAME:
MERLIN
As experts in air humidification systems and humidity measurement technology, the people at merlin
set
high standards for their work: we find the best individual solution for each of our customers.
The specialist for optimal indoor climate offers service and quality for international customers since 1995.
HON
EVOLUTIONARY
EMOTIONA

SUSTAI

GET IN TOUCH

BY PEOPLE
FOR PEOPLE
Under the direction of Johann Reisinger (CEO), Johannes Part (CFO) and Dominik Reisinger (CTO) people are motivated to develop products and solutions to create a sustainable future.
MANAGEMENT & SALES
TEAMS AND WORLDS
GLOBAL AND INTERNATIONAL
The expertise at merlin
is not limited to products for industrial humidification and humidity measurement equipment. Our
strength is the development of optimal solutions for every customer, every process and every space
. State of mind at merlin
is characterized by know-how and a spirit of innovation. It springs from a motivating corporate culture across all divisions and teams.

OUR CORPORATE CULTURE =
YOUR CUSTOMER SATISFACTION
Our motivated experts devise the best solution for you.
GET IN TOUCH
INQUIRY
CALL US
EMAIL
MILESTONES
OF SUCCESS
2025
Founding of Merlin Technology Germany GmbH in Neukirchen-Vluyn near Düsseldorf – a key step in strengthening our presence in the German market.
2023
Dominik Reisinger is appointed technical director (CTO). The son of the company founder and owner Johann Reisinger thus follows in his father's footsteps.
2021
ORBIT WING
air humidification in AHUs was successfully certified according to VDI 6022. This was followed in 2022 by the certification of CORBIT
air humidification in AHUs.
